calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. PAUL SILVER, Esq. (tel: 670-701-0171) specially appearing for Atty. Brat Yaple, Esq. on behalf of Plaintiff.
Defendant DANIEL MALLEN in pro per present (tel: 415-595-4166).

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter argued. The oath is administered to defendant Daniel Mallen. Defendant testifies he is making the student loan payments. Upon conclusion, the Court grants the claim of exemption based on defendant's representation, without prejudice to further litigate this issue.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Appearances (in person):
David Marcolini, Esq., specially appearing for Bret A. Yaple, Esq., for San Francisco Federal Credit Union, Plaintiff.
Daniel Mallen, in propria persona, Defendant.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the matter is continued to Law and Motion on Jan-27-2025 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 301.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-10-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. PAUL SILVER, Esq. (tel: 510-275-4555) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court notes the defendant/judgment debtor Daniel Mallen is not present in Court. Upon conclusion, the Court denies the claim of exemption for failure to appear.

Order signed.

Judgment: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
